description: Browse and read ebooks from Calibre library with metadata enrichment. Supports both direct database access (local mode) and Calibre Content Server (host mode). Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin ebooks with titles, authors, series, publishers, tags, and cover images from Calibre.
name: Calibre
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with Calibre ebook library. Provides metadata enrichment and cover images for locally-scanned ebooks via direct SQLite access or Calibre Content Server.

versions.changelog: v0.0.0.5: SQL schema fix - uses books_publishers_link junction table for publisher lookup.
v0.0.0.4: UI improvement - radio buttons for access mode selection. Enhanced logging with mode, location, and task markers. SQL schema fix - uses books_series_link junction table.
v0.0.0.3: Fix config UI - add clearer labels for local mode vs host mode selection.
v0.0.0.2: Add scheduled tasks - Enrich existing data with Calibre (daily 3am), Validate Calibre matches (weekly Sun 4am).
Initial pre-release: Dual access modes (local/host), metadata provider, config page with Test Connection and library selection, API controller endpoints.
